name: Best Bran Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine dry ingredients in a medium bowl; make a well in the center of the mixture.
2. Combine egg, milk, molasses, and oil; add quickly to the dry ingredients, stirring until moistened.
3. Spoon batter into muffin pans coated with cooking spray, filling each about 2/3 full.
4. Bake at 400°F for 20 minutes.
